LandingPage.featureDescription_1: Secure login with email/password and providers like Google.
LandingPage.featureDescription_2: Integrated storage with Supabase Storage, secure downloads, and permissions.
LandingPage.featureDescription_3: Ticketing system with real-time comments and status updates.
LandingPage.featureDescription_4: Total isolation per organization through subdomains or dynamic routes.
LandingPage.featureDescription_5: Adapts seamlessly to mobile devices and desktop screens.
LandingPage.featureDescription_6: Shadcn drawer with animated hamburger trigger via CSS.
LandingPage.featureDescription_7: Customized and styled error pages using the Shadcn theme system.
LandingPage.featureDescription_8: Efficient client-server communication via remote procedure calls, centralizing business logic.
LandingPage.featureDescription_9: Advanced use of Server-Side Rendering with Next.js to ensure speed and superior SEO.
LandingPage.featureDescription_10: Relational database architecture in PostgreSQL with RLS security policies and strict typing.
LandingPage.featureDescription_11: Scalable infrastructure globally deployed with native support for Edge functions.
LandingPage.hero_description: Multi-tenant project via subdomains utilizing Supabase capabilities. Database, Auth, Storage, Real Time. Robust and Secure Web Apps.
LandingPage.tenants_description: Access the company portal directly; each organization has its own workspace.
LandingPage.features_title: Everything you need for multi-org robustness
LandingPage.features_description: A secure Web App. From a robust authentication system to database-level RLS security.
LandingPage.cta_title: Ready to scale your next SaaS project?
LandingPage.cta_description: I am currently open to new opportunities and technical challenges. If you are looking for someone who truly understands the Full-Stack, let's talk.

Not-Found.notfound_description: We're sorry, the subdomain you are trying to access does not exist or is not registered in our system.

LoginPage.testimonial_1_quote: This login features a robust authentication system via a proxy that processes the security of every server request.
LoginPage.testimonial_2_quote: If someone else logs in with your username and password, you will receive an error message alerting you that someone else has your credentials.
LoginPage.testimonial_3_quote: Encrypted password thanks to Supabase's auth system, providing a mandatory security layer for real accounts.
LoginPage.demo_account_notice: Use the demo account or register an email in the registration section.

ForgotPasswordForm.forgot_password_success_description: Password reset instructions have been sent
ForgotPasswordForm.forgot_password_success_note: If you are a registered user, the link will arrive at your registered email address

LoginForm.login_card_description: Enter your email to log in with the organization: {tenant}
LoginForm.use_magic_link: Use Magic Link to log in

MagicLinkSuccessPage.magic_link_success_description: Check your inbox. We've sent a magic link so you can log in without any hassle.
MagicLinkSuccessPage.magic_link_no_email_hint: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder.

RegisterPage.register_info_quote_1: The registration system sends an email via RESEND; if the email is not verified, login is not possible.
RegisterPage.register_info_quote_2: Thanks to Supabase Cloud, your email is secure against data leaks.
RegisterPage.register_info_quote_3: The current system configuration only allows one email address per organization.
RegisterPage.register_valid_email_notice: Register a valid email if you wish to test the email activation system.
RegisterPage.demo_privacy_notice: The email is NOT used for anything beyond the demonstration this DEMO offers

TicketsPage.tickets_table_description: Table of created tickets; pagination appears after the sixth ticket

UsersTable.no_users_found: No users found for this tenant.

CreateTicketForm.alert_validation_length: A title must be at least 5 characters long and a description must contain at least 10

TicketComments.alert_error_saving_comment: Error saving comment or file upload. Temporary files have been cleared.
